news.t: Nuveen Expands Wealth Alternatives Platform with Launch of CLO Strategies

overview.description: The Nuveen AA-BBB CLO ETF (NCLO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking total return through investments in USD-denominated, investment-grade collateralized loan obligations (CLOs) of any maturity. NCLO was launched on Dec 10, 2024 and is issued by Nuveen.

data.title: Nuveen Expands Wealth Alternatives Platform with Launch of CLO Strategies
data.text: NEW YORK, Dec. 10, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Nuveen, the investment manager of TIAA, is expanding its alternative investment platform for the wealth market, launching a collateralized loan obligation (CLO)...
